name: Health and Wellness
description: Biohacking Longevity

name: Forum Week
description: A dedicated week of forum gathering to open the year. Concentrated forum meetings and stir-fries, Cross-forum mixer anchoring the chapter’s theme and calendar for the year ahead

name: Magic of Egypt - Citadel Dinner
description:
Anchored to the “Magic of egypt” Event coming to Cairo.
Private dinner at the citadel with YPO participants of the “Magic of Egypt” Trip

name: Arctic Escape Retreat
description:
Anchor destination experience of the year. 
Pair the trip with a deep theme - e.g. resilience, silence, or a leadership challenge under extreme conditions.
Build in two structured forum stir-fries to bookend the experience.

name: Fishing in the South
description:
* Two-format weekend: deep sea by day, fireside forum stir-fry by night
* Capped to keep the bonding intimate to 20
* marine biologist for a short session on Red Sea conservation

name: Dahab / Blue Hole + Breathing retreat
description:
* Physical challenge meets mindfulness.
* Freediving instruction paired with daily breathwork (Wim Hof or pranayama tradition)
* a world-class freediver or breathwork instructor as the anchor resource
* Pair the Blue Hole experience with a sunset reflection circle on fear and trust

name: Art Basel
description: Curated group trip to Art Basel with an Egyptian artist or curator as second voice. Bonding through shared viewing, then long dinners.

name: HBS flagship - Back to School
description:
* Member-pay, breakeven model with HBS resource.
* Special dinner for members and spouses. 
* Structured study groups so members mix beyond their forum/ network of friends in the chapter 
* Up to 5 executives per member. Total of 150 max.

name: Social Media Marketing Event
location: Cairo, Egypt (corporate venue of the member company that is sponsoring)
description:
* Case studies driven — show two Egyptian brands that got it right and two that got it wrong. 
* Gen Z creator alongside the marketer for generational contrast

name: YPO Gold - Estate planning
description:
* Pair the banker with a family lawyer who has handled messy successions — the cautionary voice.
* Optional spouse track or full-couple format

name: YPO Gold - Family Business Succession
description:
* Framed as ‘how to have the conversation’ rather than ‘how to structure the transition’.
* Next-gen family member from another business.

name: Longevity Live to the max
description:
* Members should complete full-body MRI (Prenuvo-style) and comprehensive blood panels 6-8 weeks before the event
* Event day: a leading longevity physician (Peter Attia–style) reviews aggregate findings, then individual consultations, pair with a nutritionist and an exercise physiologist for actionable plans
* Each member leaves with a personal 10-year health roadmap

name: Kid's University Admission CORE
description:
* Paired voices the consultant with two recent YPO kid who’s now in university.
* split sessions: one for parents, one for teens

name: The Art of Desire: Intimacy, Eroticism & Human Connection
description:
* Intimate, closed-door Valentine’s event followed by dinner.
* Edgy topic delivered with sensitivity and the right expert voice
* A talk, maybe with Q&A (Mint would develop the format)

name: What’s My Number — The Conversation No One Has at Parties
description:
* Closed-door, member-only frank workshop on what ‘enough’ actually means — for money, success, time. 
* Each member privately writes their number — net worth needed, years of work left, success markers — before any group discussion
* Structured peer rounds in groups of four — share what you’re willing to share
* Ends with each member writing one decision they’ll make differently in the next 12 months

name: AI - Part 2
description:
The anchor business-transformation. 
Part 2: AI plan for your business with HBS resource
* AI plan for your business with HBS resource (if sponsor pays)  — strategy workshop, each member leaves with a one-page plan
